tagline: A curated hub of Claude Code skills
description: SkillHub is an open-source collection of reusable Claude Code skills that automate complex workflows like presentation generation, code review, and social media promotion.

features.name: One-command install
features.description: Copy any skill into your project's .claude/skills/ directory and start using it immediately

features.name: AI-powered workflows
features.description: Each skill leverages Claude and other AI models to automate multi-step tasks

features.name: Platform integrations
features.description: Built-in support for GitHub, Slack, social media platforms, and more

target_audience: Developers and teams using Claude Code who want to automate repetitive workflows
